channel.description: Recent content in Material-Design on Arrans github.io

item.title: google/material-design-icons
item.description: Material Design icons by Google (Material Symbols)

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter
item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: mui/material-ui
item.description: Material UI: Ready-to-use foundational React components, free forever. It includes Material UI, which implements Google’s Material Design.
